evals.prompt: Fix the typo in line 42 of README.md
evals.expected_outcome: Claude grades this as a single, low-difficulty task, suggests routing to Claude (no delegation), writes the artifact, and proceeds inline — does not invoke any specialist.

assertions.name: decomposition_single
assertions.description: triage JSON has decomposition='single' and one task

assertions.name: no_codex_invoked
assertions.description: codex-invoke.mjs and agy-invoke.mjs are NOT invoked downstream

evals.prompt: Generate a hero icon for the landing page AND audit src/auth/ for race conditions in parallel
evals.expected_outcome: Claude grades as subtasks with two entries: t1 (imagegen, low/medium) and t2 (review, hard); writes the artifact; downstream invokes both at the graded efforts.

assertions.name: decomposition_subtasks
assertions.description: triage JSON has decomposition='subtasks' and exactly 2 tasks

assertions.name: icon_routed_to_codex
assertions.description: one task has suggested_specialist='codex' for the icon

assertions.name: audit_routed_hard
assertions.description: the audit task has difficulty='hard' and suggested_effort in {'high','xhigh'}

evals.prompt: Why does my test suite hang intermittently on CI?
evals.expected_outcome: Claude grades as single + hard (root-cause from symptom), suggests codex:reason at xhigh.
